{{CargoOrgan
|name=Super Sensory Cortex
|type=Common
|rank=purple
|id=10850
|idx=55
|description="All more evolved creatures have the ability to mix imagination with sensory data to create a happier version of reality. "
—Superbrain Files
|skill=
|hp=1890
|def=151
|atk=141
|rush=150
|gene1=When HP < 30%, Crit DMG REDUC +10%
|gene2=Wind RES +60
|gene3=Ignore Wind RES +60
|gene4=Wind DMG +60
|gene7=Wind DMG +3% (Awakened)
|}}
